violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective action - establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings. Establishment is to increase pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2026
The coving behind the build prep unit is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
